ddls:
CREATE TABLE "complaints" (
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complaint */,
  "record_num" TEXT /* Record number associated with the complaint */,
  "record_type" TEXT /* Type of record (e.g., Complaint, Request) */,
  "record_type_mapped" TEXT /* Mapped type of record for internal processing */,
  "record_type_desc" TEXT /* Description of the complaint type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the complaint */,
  "open_date" TEXT /* Date the complaint was opened */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection conducted */,
  "last_inspection_result" TEXT /* Result of the last inspection */,
  "status_current" TEXT /* Current status of the complaint (e.g., Completed) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Original address of the complaint */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the complaint originated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the complaint originated */,
  "zip" INTEGER /* ZIP code of the complaint location */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the detailed complaint record */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the complaint location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the complaint location */,
  "reported_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the complaint */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the complaint (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "assigned_department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department assigned to handle the complaint */,
  "assigned_inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector assigned to the complaint */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the complaint was resolved */,
  "resolution_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the resolution */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the complaint was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the complaint was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complaint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_address FOREIGN KEY ("address") REFERENCES locations ("address"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_assigned_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_reported_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_status_current FOREIGN KEY ("status_current") REFERENCES statuses ("status_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "zip" INTEGER /* ZIP code of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood where the location is situated */,
  "council_district" TEXT /* Council district of the location */,
  "geography" TEXT /* Geographical description (e.g., urban, suburban, rural) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspection_records" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection record */,
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated complaint */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date when the inspection was performed */,
  "inspection_result" TEXT /* Result of the inspection */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Name of the inspector who conducted the inspection */,
  "assigned_inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector assigned to the inspection */,
  "inspection_notes" TEXT /* Notes taken during the inspection */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inspection record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inspection record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspection_records_complaint_id FOREIGN KEY ("complaint_id") REFERENCES complaints ("complaint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspection_records_assigned_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_inspector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Completed, In Progress) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department responsible for handling complaints */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for that department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the department */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the department's website */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., citizen, inspector, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaint_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Construction, Land Use Violation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaint_category_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the complaint */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaint_category_mapping_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES complaint_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaint_category_mapping_complaint_id FOREIGN KEY ("complaint_id") REFERENCES complaints ("complaint_id")
)
